titleStmt.title: SII 36.276: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 276. (A.R. No. 276 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Makara, śu., 2, Friday, Tiruvōṇam = A.D. 1307, January 6, Friday.).

Unfinished. Remission of certain taxes on the half vēli of land at Neṉmali by the Nāṭṭār of Āyiravēlip-paṟṟu, in favour of the consort of Varaha Nāyaṉār in the temple at Aśurakulakālanallūr alias Tiruviḍavandai in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūṟ-kōṭṭam in the Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam. The remitted taxes were to be utilized for providing sacred food to the deity during the chandhi service instituted by Māthāṇḍaṉ Rācarācadēvaṉ a kiḻāṉ of Neṟkuṉṟam in Mēlūr-nāḍu, of Kulōttuṅgachōḻavalanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koṟcaṭaipaṉmar tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiyatevar
kku yāṇṭu 10 3 patiṉmūṉṟāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvitiyai
yum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇ
ṭalattu Āmuṟ koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭu Asurakulakāla nallūrāṉa tiruviṭa
vantai śrīvarāhanāyaṉār nācciyāṟku Im maṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu
Āyiravelip paṟṟil nāṭṭārom In nācciyāṟku Immaṇṭalattup puliyū
rk koṭṭattu kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu melūr nāṭṭu neṟkuṉ
ṟaṅ kiḻāṉ mātāṇṭāṉ Irācaraācatevaṉ Amutu ceyvikkiṟa tiruvotta
cāmaccantikku nāṅkaḷ Aṉaittāyamum Iḻikkac cantrādittavaraiyāka
Amutu ceyya mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvāṇṭu mutal viṭṭa paṭuvūr nā
ṭṭu Innāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam karaivaḻi neṉmali niccayi
tta tarappaṭi nilam Iraṇṭu veliyil nāliloṉṟukku viṭṭa
viḷainilam Arai Innilam Araiveliyum Inilattil viḻukkāṭā
ṉa puṟavaṭai kollaip puṉcey nattam maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa
prāptikaḷum Innāyaṉārkku Innāḷ mutal Aṉettāāya
Digital edition of SII 36.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
